code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  mut out_str = ""
  mut count = 0
  mut have_last = false
  mut last = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    else
      32
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if have
        let v = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        let emit = if have_last
          v != last
        else
          true
        end
        if emit
          if count == 0
            out_str = "#{v}"
          else
            out_str = "#{out_str} #{v}"
          end
          count = count + 1
          last = v
          have_last = true
        end
        have = false
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not have
      neg = true
      have = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out_str)
end
